LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES, INC.'S MOTION TO CONTEST DEFENDANT MONTE WEDLS NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT AND APPLICATION FOR GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT ORDER.OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY'S REQUEST. (NOTICE OF WITHDRAWAL FILED 1/21/2020.)JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MONTE WEDL'S MOTION TO SEAL APPLICATION FOR GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT ORDER. GRANT. NO OPPOSITION FILED, AND THE MOTION COMPLIES WITH CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT, RULES 2.550 AND 2.551. THE COURT FINDS THAT THERE EXISTS AN OVERRIDING INTEREST THAT OVERCOMES THE RIGHT OF PUBLIC ACCESS TO THE PORTIONS OF THE RECORDS TO BE SEALED; THE OVERRIDING INTEREST SUPPORTS SEALING THOSE RECORDS; A SUBSTANTIAL PROBABILITY EXISTS THAT THE OVERRIDING INTEREST WILL BE PREJUDICED IF THE RECORD IS NOT SEALED; THE PROPOSED SEALING IS NARROWLY TAILORED; AND NO LESS RESTRICTIVE MEANS EXIST TO ACHIEVE THE OVERRIDING INTEREST. COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT WEDL IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED AND MUST BRING IT TO THE HEARING OR EMAIL IT TO CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG PRIOR TO THE HEARING EVEN IF THE TENTATIVE RULING IS NOT CONTESTED.ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

Motion To Contest Defendant Monte Wedls Notice Of Settlement And Application For Good Faith Settlement Order
Off Calendar Feb-05-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES, INC.'s Motion To Contest Defendant Monte Wedls Notice Of Settlement And Application For Good Faith Settlement Order.

Off calendar per moving party's request. (Notice of withdrawal filed 1/21/2020.)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Application For Good Faith Settlement Order; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
Off Calendar Feb-05-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MONTE WEDL's Motion To Seal Application For Good Faith Settlement Order.

Grant. No opposition filed, and the motion complies with California Rules of Court, Rules 2.550 and 2.551. The Court finds that there exists an overriding interest that overcomes the right of public access to the portions of the records to be sealed; the overriding interest supports sealing those records; a substantial probability exists that the overriding interest will be prejudiced if the record is not sealed; the proposed sealing is narrowly tailored; and no less restrictive means exist to achieve the overriding interest. Counsel for defendant Wedl is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed and must bring it to the hearing or email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the hearing even if the tentative ruling is not contested.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Application For Good Faith Settlement Order; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support

DEFENDANT MONTE WEDL's Motion To Seal Application For Good Faith Settlement Order is continued to February 5, 2020 to be heard with United Airlines, Inc.'s motion to contest Defendant Monte Wedl's notice of settlement and application for good faith settlement order.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
